hard_rules: No active panel mutation in Phase28G.
8 centers may remain visually; only decision authority is pruned.
Fast Path accepts only core gate/route compact state.
Evidence centers cannot open route/action directly.
AI remains Slow Path + Audit only.

asset_status_plan.ACTIVE_KEEP: currently used and fits locked center identity
asset_status_plan.CANDIDATE_KEEP: possible future asset, not active authority
asset_status_plan.REMOVE_LATER_AFTER_APPROVAL: only after explicit future cleanup approval
